/datum/overmap/fluff/fakeplanet/moon_2.name: Icarus
/datum/overmap/fluff/fakeplanet/moon_2.desc: Formerly Kepler-453c, this planet is too close to the binary sun system to sustain any form of atmosphere, let alone habitation. Because of said proximity, it was nicknamed by the locals 'Icarus.' is likely nothing of interest here. Traveling here is a waste of time.

/datum/overmap/fluff/fakeplanet/rock_7.name: Loner
/datum/overmap/fluff/fakeplanet/rock_7.desc: A rocky world. Since it's so far out and there was no attempts to colonize it, the locals nicnamed this planet "Loner", from this previous name of Kepler-453d There is likely nothing of interest here. Traveling here is a waste of time.
